question: Chapters
feedback: The passage does not list any main sections or chapters of the thesis. It only presents a problem statement and context, so the reader cannot identify the thesis structure from this text.

question: Description
feedback: No brief descriptions of individual sections are provided. The text merely sets up the problem and motivation, lacking any overview of what each chapter will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: The passage offers no clues to the overall structure of the thesis. It does not mention how the content will be organized or what major components (e.g., literature review, methodology, results) will appear.
